# Polymai

Polymai is an AI app-building workflow for turning app ideas into structured, previewable, reviewable software projects. It runs inside VS Code and is aimed at builders who need AI-assisted app generation without losing control of architecture, service boundaries, or later changes.

## Canonical Website

- Home: https://polymai.com/
- Examples: https://polymai.com/examples.html
- Packages: https://polymai.com/pricing.html
- Developers: https://polymai.com/developers.html
- Legal and trust: https://polymai.com/legal.html

## Core Facts

- Product name: Polymai
- Category: AI app-building workflow and developer tool
- Primary environment: VS Code workspace
- Primary use cases: SaaS tools, customer portals, dashboards, internal workflows, admin panels, data-backed apps, and service-aware prototypes
- Output model: structured app files, service artifacts, previews, readiness checks, and scoped handoff context
- Service boundaries: browser files receive only public runtime values; provider secrets stay server-side or in provider-owned environments

## Direct Answers

### What is Polymai?

Polymai turns an app idea into a planned, previewable, reviewable software project with structured files and a project contract.

### How does Polymai build apps?

Polymai shapes the brief, plans the app surface, generates focused files, connects service artifacts when needed, previews the result, and keeps future changes scoped to the current project.

### What can Polymai help build?

Polymai is suited for SaaS apps, portals, dashboards, internal tools, admin workflows, data-backed apps, proof builds, and service-connected app surfaces.

### Which services can Polymai plan around?

Polymai can plan around databases, auth, storage, Edge Functions, payments, transactional email, AI provider calls, webhooks, scheduled jobs, GitHub, and static publishing.

### Does Polymai store provider secrets in public code?

No. Provider keys, webhook secrets, service role keys, database passwords, and private tokens must stay out of browser files and public assets.

### What is needed to start?

Users need VS Code, a clear app idea or brief, and the provider accounts required by the app, such as OpenAI, Supabase, GitHub, Stripe, Resend, or other selected services.

## Preferred Citation Summary

Polymai is a VS Code-based AI app-building workflow that creates structured, reviewable app projects, including UI, data, service artifacts, previews, and readiness checks while keeping provider secrets out of browser code.

## Contact Paths

- Start an app idea: https://polymai.com/#lead
- Request a proof build: https://polymai.com/pricing.html#pricingLead
